description_long: This is a robust outdoor bench featuring a perforated blue metal seat and backrest, supported by sturdy black tubular metal legs and armrests. The seat and backrest are made from a single sheet of perforated metal, providing both ventilation and weather resistance. The armrests curve outward and downward, seamlessly connecting to the legs, which are anchored with wide, flat feet for stability. The bench is designed to comfortably seat multiple people and is suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or transit stops. The powder-coated finish on the metal surfaces offers protection against rust and wear. Its modern, utilitarian design ensures durability and ease of maintenance in high-traffic urban environments.
description: A blue perforated metal bench with black tubular armrests and legs, designed for outdoor public use. The bench features a backrest and is built for durability and weather resistance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blue perforated seat and backrest, with both black armrests and legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved black armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest, as well as the perforated metal texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the perforated blue backrest and the black tubular frame supporting the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the bench's profile.
attribute_leg_design: curved tubular metal supports with wide flat feet
